<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk005.pdf#page=12 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p222 -->

<!-- header: MARIA THALHEIM -->

<!-- header: MARIA THALHEIN -->


[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img001.jpg|thumb|K<sub>6</sub> Grego]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img004.jpg|thumb|K<sub>s-10</sub> Kirchenlehre]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img006.jpg|thumb]]



== Ouellen und Literatur ==



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p012_img008.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p223 -->
